title: Atlas Expansion XIII: Domains 766-795 (Geometric Analysis & Nonlinear PDE)

D767.name: Mean curvature flow
D767.reason: Velocity = mean curvature vector; real PDE = EML-2

D768.name: Yamabe problem (conformal geometry)
D768.reason: Δu + c_n R u = c_n R̃ u^{(n+2)/(n-2)}: real = EML-2

D770.name: Geometric measure theory (Federer)
D770.reason: Rectifiable currents; real Hausdorff measure = EML-2

D773.name: Gauge theory (Yang-Mills over 4-manifolds)
D773.reason: F_A curvature form; complex gauge = EML-3

D775.name: Seiberg-Witten theory
D775.reason: SW equations; spinor fields; complex = EML-3

D776.name: Floer homology
D776.reason: Morse theory on loop space; holomorphic disks = EML-3

D778.name: Contact geometry
D778.reason: ξ = ker(α); CR structure; complex = EML-3

D783.name: Ginzburg-Landau equation
D783.reason: Complex order parameter ψ; vortex solutions = EML-3

D784.name: Einstein field equations
D784.reason: G_μν = 8πT_μν: real tensor; Lorentzian metric = EML-2

D786.name: Euler equations (inviscid)
D786.reason: Blow-up open; enstrophy cascade non-constructive = EML-∞

D787.name: Monge-Ampère equation
D787.reason: det D²u = f: real fully nonlinear = EML-2

D790.name: Hyperbolic conservation laws (Glimm)
D790.reason: Entropy solutions; Glimm scheme real = EML-2

D793.name: Gross-Pitaevskii equation (BEC)
D793.reason: iℏ∂_t ψ = Hψ: complex condensate = EML-3

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 13 (T152, S432): 30 geometric analysis/nonlinear PDE domains. Geometric flows: Ricci/mean curvature = EML-2 (real tensor/vector). Gauge theory cluster: Atiyah-Singer, Donaldson, Seiberg-Witten, Floer, Gromov = ALL EML-3. Nonlinear PDE: NLS/KdV/Ginzburg-Landau = EML-3; Navier-Stokes/Euler = EML-∞ (turbulence/blow-up non-constructive). Boltzmann: EML-1 (H-theorem logarithmic). 0 violations. Total domains: 805.
